<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Scratch 2.0</title>
<link rel="icon" href="data:image/x-icon;base64," type="image/x-icon">
<style>html,body,#p{margin:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden}</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="p"></div>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/@ruffle-rs/ruffle"></script>
<script>
const p=RufflePlayer.newest().createPlayer();
document.getElementById("p").appendChild(p);
p.style.width=p.style.height="100%";
p.load("scratch.swf");
</script>
</body>
</html>
